steps: Go to https://www.twilio.com/try-twilio and sign up for a free account (or log in at https://console.twilio.com)
After email verification, you are taken directly to the Twilio Console dashboard
Your Account SID and Auth Token are displayed on the dashboard home page
Click the eye icon next to the Auth Token to reveal it
Copy both the Account SID and Auth Token — these are your credentials

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Account SID
credential_fields.description: Your Twilio Account SID (used as the username in HTTP Basic Auth)

notes: Twilio uses HTTP Basic Auth: Account SID as the username and Auth Token as the password
Free trial account includes $15.50 credit and a free test phone number
Trial accounts can only send messages to verified phone numbers
The Auth Token should be treated as a password — rotate it in the console if compromised
API keys (separate from Account SID/Auth Token) can be created at https://console.twilio.com/us1/account/keys for scoped access

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve account information — replace {AccountSid} with your actual Account SID
